task_completion.description: Verify that the functional cameras (CAM-0101 through CAM-0105) have their MAC and IP addresses updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Snipe-IT asset list or individual asset detail pages showing populated MAC address and IP address fields for assets CAM-0101, CAM-0102, CAM-0103, CAM-0104, and CAM-0105.

task_completion.description: Verify that the functional cameras (CAM-0101 through CAM-0105) have updated deployment notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Snipe-IT showing the 'Notes' field populated with deployment information for assets CAM-0101 through CAM-0105.

task_completion.description: Verify that the functional cameras (CAM-0101 through CAM-0105) are checked out to the 'Chicago Facility'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Snipe-IT showing the Location or Checkout Status for CAM-0101 through CAM-0105 explicitly listed as 'Chicago Facility'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the defective camera (CAM-0106) has its status updated to 'Defective'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Snipe-IT showing the Status label for asset CAM-0106 set to 'Defective'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the defective camera (CAM-0106) includes the DOA note in its notes field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Snipe-IT showing the 'Notes' field for asset CAM-0106 containing a DOA (Dead on Arrival) or cracked lens note.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating and interacting with the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or direct database SQL queries) to modify the assets.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened and read the deployment manifest file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening 'camera_network_config.txt' in a text editor (like gedit or nano) or viewing its contents in the terminal (e.g., using cat or less) to extract the required MAC/IP addresses and notes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the Snipe-IT system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Snipe-IT asset edit forms being filled out or the final saved asset pages in the web browser, not just the agent typing the expected answers into a blank text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The deployment manifest is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/camera_network_config.txt'. The functional cameras are CAM-0101, CAM-0102, CAM-0103, CAM-0104, and CAM-0105, which must be checked out to the 'Chicago Facility'. The defective camera is CAM-0106, which must have its status set to 'Defective' and include a DOA note (cracked lens) in its notes.
